nodes.name: .env
nodes.summary: Local environment variables for Vite client: Supabase URL/key, OneSignal, Sentry, Google Analytics, Clarity, PostHog, support contacts, and app version.

nodes.name: .env.example
nodes.summary: Template documenting all expected environment variables: client-side VITE_* keys plus server-side secrets for auth, email (Resend/Postmark), Twilio Verify, OpenAI, cron, and Supabase service role.

nodes.name: .mcp.json
nodes.summary: Model Context Protocol server registration declaring which MCP servers Claude Code should attach for this project.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Behavioral guidelines for AI coding agents (think-before-coding, simplicity, surgical changes, goal-driven execution) plus gstack skill list, PR workflow, and review/quality workflow.

nodes.name: CHANGELOG.md
nodes.summary: Project changelog following Keep-a-Changelog format tracking unreleased additions and the initial 0.0.0 release notes.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Claude-specific behavioral guidelines mirroring AGENTS.md: think-before-coding, simplicity, surgical changes, goal-driven execution, plus gstack skill catalog and agent skills index.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Lovable project overview with editing options (Lovable web UI, local IDE, GitHub Codespaces), tech stack (Vite/React/TS/shadcn/Tailwind), local env setup, and deployment instructions.

nodes.name: SECURITY.md
nodes.summary: Security policy declaring supported versions and the vulnerability reporting process.

nodes.name: capacitor.config.ts
nodes.summary: Capacitor configuration declaring the native app id, name, and web build directory used when packaging the React app as a mobile binary.

nodes.name: codemagic.yaml
nodes.summary: Codemagic CI/CD workflow definition that builds and signs the Capacitor-wrapped iOS/Android app for App Store / Play Store delivery.

nodes.name: components.json
nodes.summary: shadcn/ui generator configuration: style preset, TSX output, Tailwind integration, lucide icon library, and path aliases for components/hooks/lib/utils.

nodes.name: eslint.config.js
nodes.summary: Flat ESLint config wiring TypeScript-ESLint, React Hooks, and React Refresh rules for the Vite source tree.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Vite HTML entry document defining the #root mount point, meta/SEO tags, and the script tag loading src/main.tsx as a module.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: npm manifest declaring the wzwznew app metadata, scripts (dev/build/lint), and the full Vite + React + shadcn/Radix + Supabase + Capacitor dependency surface.

nodes.name: postcss.config.js
nodes.summary: Minimal PostCSS config enabling tailwindcss and autoprefixer plugins for the Vite CSS pipeline.

nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: Python project manifest for the auxiliary tooling/scripts: setuptools build system, optional dev dependencies, and pytest/ruff/mypy tool configuration.

nodes.name: skills-lock.json
nodes.summary: Lockfile pinning gstack/Claude skill versions and source URLs so agent skills resolve deterministically across machines.

nodes.name: tailwind.config.ts
nodes.summary: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark-mode class strategy, content globs over src/, shadcn-style theme tokens (colors, radius, keyframes), and plugin registrations.

nodes.name: tsconfig.app.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript compiler options for the application source: ES2020 target, React JSX, bundler module resolution, and the @/* path alias rooted at src/.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: Root TypeScript solution config referencing tsconfig.app.json and tsconfig.node.json with loose project-wide compiler options shared by both.
